description: Letter with legal content, signed by Shelomo b. Nisan ha-Kohen and [...] b.Yehuda, to multiple addressees. In Judaeo-Arabic. Concerns the oil merchant (al-zayyāt) Yūsuf b. Ṣadaqa and the legal question of whether or not he divorced a certain woman and/or if he is still married. There is additional note in a different hand, in which Shelomo b. Yiṣḥaq affirms that "he divorced the sister of Mawhūb."
